titles: "60:40이 -17.5% 박살 날 때 이 세 놈만 웃었다" 박대리가 놓친 제3의 바퀴 — 금·원자재·리츠 25분 마스터
금값 5,589달러 사상 최고 — 지금 사도 되나? 55:30:15 포트폴리오 실전 공식
레이 달리오 올웨더 vs 박대리 포트폴리오 — 대안 자산 15% 넣으면 생기는 일
thumbnail_texts: 금 5,589달러 사상 최고 / 지금 사도 될까

character_poses.1: REACT-03 자신감/결론 — 60:40 박살난 자리에서 금·원자재·리츠 셋이 우상향, 결론 엄지척
character_poses.2: REACT-06 기쁨/호재 — 사상 최고 금값, 황금 금괴 위 환호
character_poses.3: INTRO-03 돋보기 분석 — 55:30:15 황금비율 공식 파헤치는 탐정 똑똑이

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 자신감/결론(REACT-03). 좌측 똑똑이가 가슴 펴고 엄지 척, 자신감 있는 미소. 우측 배경에 회색 깨진 60:40 파이차트가 떨어지고, 그 자리에 황금 막대 3개(금괴 형상·원유 배럴·고층빌딩 미니어처)가 우상향으로 솟아오름. 셋 모두 빛나는 황금 글로우. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with confident sparkle, small pink nose, proud smile, one paw raised with thumb up, standing tall with chest out. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot. On the RIGHT side: in the background a faded gray broken pie chart labeled with abstract '60:40' shape crumbling and falling away into dust. Rising up powerfully in the foreground from where the broken chart fell, three glowing golden vertical bars stand triumphantly — one shaped like a stack of gold bars, one shaped like an oil barrel, one shaped like a miniature skyscraper representing REITs — all radiating warm golden light beams with upward growth arrows above each. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 기쁨/호재(REACT-06). 중앙 똑똑이가 거대한 황금 금괴 위에 서서 양손 들어 환호, 큰 미소, 주변 별·반짝이. 똑똑이 뒤로 가파르게 우상향하는 황금 곡선이 사상 최고점에 빛나는 별. 금괴 아래 작은 의문 표시. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with happy sparkles, small pink nose, big joyful smile with slightly open mouth. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, full body shot, both paws raised in celebration with small bright stars and sparkle particles scattered around, standing triumphantly atop a massive glowing golden gold bar. Behind the skunk, a steeply upward-curving golden line chart soars dramatically to a brilliant glowing star at its peak indicating an all-time high. Below the gold bar, a small softly glowing question mark icon hovers, suggesting the buy timing question. Background: deep navy blue gradient sky with rich golden bokeh sparkles, confetti-like particles, and a powerful warm radial glow behind the skunk. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with celebratory gold aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 돋보기 분석(INTRO-03). 좌측 똑똑이가 갈색 트렌치코트와 중절모, 큰 황금 돋보기를 한 눈에 갖다 댐. 우측에 거대한 원형 파이차트 — 큰 황금 영역 55%, 중간 에메랄드 30%, 작은 보라 15%. 각 영역에 작은 아이콘(주식·채권·대안). 파이 위로 황금 후광. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, determined detective expression wearing a brown trench coat and small fedora hat, holding a large golden magnifying glass up to one eye, examining something closely with slight forward lean. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large beautifully balanced pie chart with three distinct slices — a dominant golden 55 percent slice with a small chart icon, a medium emerald-green 30 percent slice with a small bond icon, and a smaller purple 15 percent slice with a small alternative-asset icon (resembling a gold bar). The pie chart glows with warm golden lens flare and sparkle particles around it. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold-emerald-purple palette.
